scripts.seed: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const db = require('./src/db'); async function seed() { const sql = fs.readFileSync('sql/seed_data.sql', 'utf8'); await db.query(sql); console.log('✅ Seed data inserted!'); await db.end(); } seed();"
scripts.seed-extended: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const db = require('./src/db'); async function seed() { const sql = fs.readFileSync('sql/extended_seed.sql', 'utf8'); await db.query(sql); console.log('✅ Extended seed data inserted!'); await db.end(); } seed();"
